title: Filipino-Style Sweet Rice Cake
description: A traditional Filipino dessert made with sweet rice and flour, perfect for any occasion.
instructions: Mix together the sweet rice and flour in a bowl.
Add the Filipino-style sweet rice mixture and mix well.
Pour in the milk and stir until the mixture is smooth.
Pour the mixture into a greased cake pan.
Bake for 30-40 minutes or until the cake is golden brown.
Let the cake cool before serving.
Serve warm with a scoop of vanilla ice cream or whipped cream, if desired.
